_meta.name: Aave V3 Flash Loan — IFlashLoanSimpleReceiver + IFlashLoanReceiver
_meta.note: Your contract MUST implement executeOperation(). Call flashLoanSimple() or flashLoan() on the Aave Pool.
_meta.fee: 0.05% of borrowed amount (5 bps). Fee = amount * 0.0005

IFlashLoanSimpleReceiver.description: Implement this interface in YOUR contract to receive single-asset flash loans

IFlashLoanReceiver.description: Implement this interface in YOUR contract to receive multi-asset flash loans

Pool_flashLoan_functions.description: These are on the AAVE POOL contract — call these to INITIATE a flash loan
